templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://inkkas.com/pages/size-chart

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@inkkas.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/inkkasworldwear/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/Inkkas/

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://inkkas.com/collections/clearance

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All our shoes are made in Mexico.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://inkkas.com/pages/rewards

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS, or DHL. Once shipped, it will take 5-7 business days for domestic orders, and 14-20 business for international orders.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $150 and to Canada for orders of $200 or more. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Do your shoes have arch support?
templates.content: Yes, our shoes provide arch support that is sufficient for the curvature of the average foot. However, if you typically wear orthopedic insoles in your shoes, you may want to use orthopedic insoles in your Inkkas as well. Our insoles are removable to make room for orthopedic inserts for the following collections: Slip Ons, High Tops, Low Tops, Camping Boots, and Trekk Boots.

templates.name: Are your shoes waterproof?
templates.content: While our shoes are not waterproof, they're water-resistant. This means they will resist the intrusion of light water (yes, you can stroll around on rainy days). However, if you plan to take them into inclement weather, we recommend using this spray-on protectant to further protect or waterproof your shoes - https://inkkas.com/products/nikwax-fabric-leather-proof-spray?_pos=1&_sid=fd960d240&_ss=r

templates.name: Are your shoes designed for performance, like hiking or running?
templates.content: All of our shoes, including our Joggers, Runners, Camping Boots, and Trekks, are designed as a comfortable lifestyle footwear. They are made to be comfortable and durable, and many have found them to be great for long walks or casual jogs and hikes, depending on specific needs. However, they aren't designed as technical performance footwear.

templates.name: How does my purchase help reforestation?
templates.content: Thanks to our partnership with Trees for The Future (https://trees.org), an award-winning global tree planting organization, that we can guarantee you that your purchase will directly allow for a new tree to be planted on the planet. With your support, we've been responsible for planting more than 325,050 trees as of 2022.

templates.name: I have wide feet; do you carry sizes for people with wide feet?
templates.content: At this time, we only make shoes in "regular" standard widths. We don't currently offer wide sizes. However, the construction of our Joggers - https://inkkas.com/collections/jogger-1 and Slip Ons - https://inkkas.com/collections/slip-on collections tend to accommodate wider feet. I'd recommend giving these a try!

templates.name: Care Instructions
templates.content: We don't recommend putting Inkkas shoes in the washing machine. To keep your Inkkas clean and looking good, we recommend spot-cleaning them with a rag and a little soap and water. For leather areas, spot clean with water only or use a specialized leather cleaner.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at support@inkkas.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and apply for our ambassador program here: https://inkkas.com/pages/brand-ambassador

templates.name: Sizing (shoes)
templates.content: Happy to help! We created detailed size guides on each product page for your quick reference. Please refer to those for size and fit information for a particular shoe. You can also check out our size charts here: https://inkkas.com/pages/size-chart

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://inkkas.com/a/return

templates.name: Do you offer free returns?
templates.content: Return shipping is free within 7 days after delivery. For any return made between 8 - 30 days from the date of delivery, you will be required to pay for the return shipping costs.

templates.name: What does “handcrafted” mean?
templates.content: Our footwear designs rely on age-old, small batch craft techniques that are better for people and the planet. We use the finest textiles, leathers and vegan leathers to develop comfortable and vibrant shoes, all crafted by hand.

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: Your refund will be processed once the returned items are received by our warehouse. Please note that it may take up to 10 business days for your refund to be processed after your return is received at our warehouse.

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://inkkas.com/collections/clearance

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://inkkas.com/pages/return-policy
